q: Called 'The Great One,' this hockey legend scored 894 career NHL goals and holds the record for most career points with 2,857. Name him.
I hold the NHL record for most goals in a single season with 92, set during the 1981-82 season. Who am I?
This Pittsburgh Penguins legend scored 690 career goals and won 6 Art Ross Trophies despite battling Hodgkin lymphoma and chronic back problems. Name him.
Known as 'Mr. Hockey,' this player competed in the NHL across five decades and scored 801 career goals. Name him.
I am the only defenseman in NHL history to score 46 goals in a single season, doing so with the Boston Bruins in 1970-71. Who am I?
This Czech goaltender won the Hart Trophy as NHL MVP twice, in 1997 and 1998, while playing for the Buffalo Sabres. Name him.
I hold the NHL record for most career playoff game-winning goals with 24, earned across my time with the Edmonton Oilers, Los Angeles Kings, and other teams. Who am I?
